verses.1: Listen now to what the LORD says:
verses.2: Hear, you mountains, the LORD’s indictment,
verses.3: My people, what have I done to you?
verses.4: For I brought you up out of the land of Egypt,
verses.5: My people, remember now what Balak king of Moab devised,
verses.6: How shall I come before the LORD,
verses.7: Will the LORD be pleased with thousands of rams?
verses.8: He has shown you, O man, what is good.
verses.9: The LORD’s voice calls to the city—
verses.10: Are there yet treasures of wickedness in the house of the wicked,
verses.12: Her rich men are full of violence,
verses.13: Therefore I also have struck you with a grievous wound.
verses.14: You shall eat, but not be satisfied.
verses.15: You will sow, but won’t reap.
verses.16: For the statutes of Omri are kept,
